case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. MICHAEL J VALENTIN

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT VALENTIN, MICHAEL J SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-27-2020

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2020 CONTINUED TO FEB-23-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100123166)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-23-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
